calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-27-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Jul-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trang La for Shi Deng Hu.

Ms. La reported that funds will not be released until the end of this month and that the bank will have 15 days after that to file the receipt. The court stated that it will continue the matter for 30 days, that this has been continued many times and that it does not want to get to the point of setting sanctions. Ms. La stated that she has been dealing with the bank continuously, will take the funds directly to the bank as soon as they are received and will remind the bank that the receipt must be filed within 15 days. The status on filing a receipt for blocked account was continued to July 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court will impose sanctions of $25.00 per day if the receipt is not on file at that time.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Continued To Jun-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Order Directing Disposition Of Minor'S Funds
Off Calendar Mar-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trang La for (petitioner) Shi Deng Hu. Arthur Tran, Guardian ad Litem for Hanson Lai.

Counsel stated that they had no additional arguments. The petition for order directing disposition of minor's funds was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
